title: laburnum anagyroides f. aureum
intro: Laburnum anagyroides f. aureum, also known as Golden Laburnum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the legume family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Golden Laburnum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Golden Laburnum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and its flowers are also used in herbal remedies, although caution is advised due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
